stemHtml: What should a pilot do when critical engine parameters (EGT, EPR) are exceeded?

options.a: Only exceeding the EGT has to be reported in the technical log book.
options.b: Reporting in the technical log book is not required when critical values are only exceeded briefly.
options.c: Only exceeding the EPR has to be reported in the technical log book.
options.d: Exceeding either EGT or EPR, or both of them, has to be reported in the technical log book.
